Fyron
Fyron
Introduction

Introduction

Fyron — Laravel-style Node.js framework built on Fastify 5, Drizzle ORM, and TypeScript.

Fyron is a backend framework for Node.js that brings Laravel's developer ergonomics to the TypeScript/ESM ecosystem. It is opinionated about structure but stays thin on abstractions — everything compiles down to ordinary Fastify routes and Drizzle queries.

Core stack

LayerLibrary
HTTP serverFastify 5
Database ORMDrizzle ORM + pg
Authenticationbetter-auth
Dependency injectiontsyringe
ValidationZod 4
Mailnodemailer + Handlebars
Schedulercroner
Loggingpino

Packages

PackagePurpose
@fyron/coreFramework runtime (HTTP, DB, auth, mail, scheduler, DI, validation)
@fyron/cliArtisan-style CLI — generators, serve, migrate, db:seed, schedule:*
create-fyron-appProject scaffolder
